name: Ultimate Crystal Rainbow Dragon Overdrive
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>究</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>極</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きょく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>宝</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ほう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>玉</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぎょく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>神</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> レインボー・ドラゴン オーバー・ドライブ
name_jp_rom: Kyūkyoku Hōgyokushin Reinbō Doragon Ōbā Doraibu
name_jp_tl: Ultimate Gem God Rainbow Dragon Over Drive
desc:
1 "Ultimate Crystal" monster + 7 "Crystal Beast" monsters
Must be Special Summoned (from your Extra Deck) during a Duel you Special Summoned an "Ultimate Crystal" monster, by banishing the above monsters from your field and/or GY. While 7 or more of your "Crystal Beast" monsters with different names are banished, this card gains 7000 ATK. If this card has not battled this turn (Quick Effect): You can Tribute this card; shuffle as many cards on the field as possible into the Deck, and if you do, Special Summon any number of your banished "Crystal Beast" monsters.

sets.set: Structure Deck: Legend of the Crystal Beasts

jp_sets.set: Structure Deck: Legend of the Crystals Light of Transcending Bonds Pack

summoning: Special Summons itself from your Extra Deck
banished: Banishes Fusion Materials for Contact Fusion
